title: Kitted
description: Easy kit management for single player worlds or your own servers.
body:
**Kitted** is a lightweight **Fabric mod for saving and reloading personal inventory kits** through a clean in-game GUI.

It’s made for players who want fast access to repeat loadouts, especially in **PvP practice worlds**, **training servers where they have OP**, or any setup where rebuilding the same inventory over and over gets old. Save a kit once, then bring it back in a couple clicks.

## What it does

Kitted lets you save your current inventory as a reusable kit, including your **hotbar, main inventory, armor, and offhand**. From there, you can open the menu with `/kitted`, pick the loadout you want, and load it back quickly without manually replacing every item.

Each kit can be given its own **name** and **icon**, so it’s easy to keep different setups organized. That makes it useful for things like sword kits, axe kits, crystal kits, pot kits, or general testing loadouts.

## Features

- Save your current inventory as a personal kit
- Load saved kits from a simple in-game GUI
- Rename kits anytime
- Set a custom kit icon using the item in your hand
- Delete kits you no longer need
- Animated kit loading with sound feedback
- Kits persist between sessions

## Best for

- PvP practice worlds
- training servers where you have operator access
- testing and comparing loadouts
- quickly restoring favorite gear setups
- swapping between multiple personal kits

## Command

- `/kitted` opens the kit menu

## Notes

Kitted is currently **operator-only**, so it works best in singleplayer worlds with cheats enabled, private practice worlds, or servers where you’ve been given OP. It is **not designed as a full server-wide kit management system** for many players.
